label: grn_from_po_wizard_3step
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog + DialogContent
3-step useState state machine → useForm + multi-step wizard hook (react-hook-form v7+)
Mock WH_POS_RECEIVING array → Server-side query from PO table + cached query invalidation
Inline addRow/removeRow table mutations → Server Actions with transaction + optimistic UI
Hardcoded PL labels ('Receipt lines', 'Review & complete') → next-intl i18n keys + useTranslations hook
Alert boxes with alert-box CSS class → shadcn Alert + AlertDescription components
Emit warehouse event (GRN created) → Outbox pattern with Service Bus / event store
GRN number auto-generation → Call generation service (idempotent via request ID)

label: grn_from_to_form
translation_notes: Simple checkbox-based LP selection → React hook form controlled checkboxes with server validation
Hardcoded transitLps mock → Query from lp_reservations where state='transit'
Destination location select on checked row → Conditional render via form watch hook
Scan input → Scanner integration (06-Scanner module) via barcode parser
Local Set state → Server-side validation of LP selection rules
Alert box notifications → Toast notifier (react-hot-toast or shadcn Toast)

label: stock_move_form_with_approval_gate
translation_notes: Conditional reason-field visibility → Form.watch + dynamic Field rendering
Approval gate at >10% delta → Server-side rule engine (V-WH-MOV-004 validation rule)
LP scan input → Scanner module integration with barcode validation
Move type enum (transfer/adjustment/return) → TypeScript discriminated union on domain model
Auto-split notice → Informational banner, actual split is separate operation (M-04)
ReasonInput component (reason = 'other') → Textarea with minLength validation via Zod
Alert coloring (amber for approval, blue for info) → Conditional className + shadcn Alert variant

label: lp_split_multi_row_validator
translation_notes: Sum validator (sum === lp.qty) → Zod schema with .refine() for cross-field validation
Dynamic row add/remove → Form.useFieldArray() from react-hook-form with drag-reorder
Alert box color-coding (ok/warn/err) → Conditional alert severity via computed validation state
Table of output LPs → Controlled input fields with onChange handlers → useFieldArray integration
Label checkbox per row → Hidden server-side logic (label print job creation)
Genealogy note text → Read-only info box (not submitted, advisory only)

label: lp_merge_2step_wizard
translation_notes: 2-step flow (select primary → add secondaries) → useMultiStep hook + step guards
Inline LP validation on scan → Real-time Server Action (validate LP eligibility)
Rejected LP rows (red background) → Conditional tr className from validation response
Validation rules per merge (same product/batch/warehouse) → Domain service method validateMergeEligibility
Summary component for totals → Read-only display of calculated values (no form binding)
Genealogy note → Post-success event emission (genealogy record operation: merge)

label: qa_status_change_dual_path
translation_notes: State machine transitions (PASSED→HOLD, HOLD→RELEASED/FAILED/QUARANTINED) → Enum graph stored in rules registry (qa_status_machine_v1)
Dynamic reason options per transition target → Computed enum list from rule payload
Conditional reason-text field (reason='other') → Form validation gate + minLength requirement
Alert coloring (amber for COND_APPROVED, red for FAILED) → Conditional banner via target status lookup
Button color variant based on target (btn-danger for FAILED) → Computed class from state machine data
Modal footer actions → Disabled unless reason is selected and (if textRequired) reasonText >= 10 chars

label: label_print_modal_with_history
translation_notes: Label preview HTML (QR, barcode, product info) → Template-based ZPL generation (future P2: real ZPL render via Stripe/Puppeteer)
Printer selection with online status → Query from printer registry (devices/printers table with heartbeat)
Template dropdown (std/mini/pallet) → Configurable templates from warehouse settings (WH_SETTINGS.labels.templates)
Queue checkbox → Deferred job creation if printer offline (background print job queue table)
Reprint history table → Readonly query from label_jobs table filtered by LP#
Copies input (min 1, max 10) → Form validation via Zod number().min(1).max(10)
Button disabled state when !sel?.online && !queue → Logical AND enforcement
known_bugs: BL-WH-04: Label ZPL render — preview is HTML-structured, not real ZPL/EPL rendering

label: reserve_hard_lock_form
translation_notes: LP picker vs manual input → Autocomplete input with query (search lp table by status='available')
LP validation alerts (expiry before WO end, conflict with existing reservation) → Server-side validation rules V-WH-FEFO-003/005
Intermediate LP block → Read-only check (item_type='intermediate' has no reservations, consumed at scan)
Reservation qty logic (remaining = lpAvail - qty) → Computed field display, validated by Zod
Conflict detection → Query existing reservations table for same LP (hard-lock uniqueness constraint)
Alert banners (amber for expiry, red for conflict) → Conditional render based on validation result

label: release_reservation_destructive
translation_notes: Destructive action (btn-danger) → Visually distinct button styling from shadcn Button variant='destructive'
Release reason enum (consumed/cancelled/wo_cancelled/admin_override) → Select options from exhaustive list
Conditional reasonText field (admin_override path) → Form watch + conditional Field render
Admin override amber banner → Alert variant='warning' with compliance audit notice
Summary of LP/WO/Qty/Reserved-at → Read-only display (no form binding)
Confirmation semantics → 'Confirm release' button disabled until reason selected

label: fefo_deviation_confirm_compare
translation_notes: FEFO suggestion vs user selection comparison → Display suggested LP (rank #1) vs selected (user choice)
Reason code enum (batch_exhaustion/qa_release/physical_accessibility/line_priority/operator_decision/other) → Dropdown from domain rules
Conditional reasonText field → Form watch + visibility gate on reason='other'
Comparison cards (.fefo-compare) → Two-column layout with styled card containers and delta display (days later)
Warning banner (amber) → Non-blocking confirmation (user can override FEFO)
Audit note at bottom → Informational text about FEFO override logging

label: destroy_lp_destructive_with_confirm
translation_notes: Destructive action (btn-danger) + explicit confirm checkbox → Two-stage verification (reason required + checkbox acked)
Partial scrap scenario (qtyToScrap < lp.qty) → Triggers LP split operation first (orchestration via Server Action)
Reason code enum (damage/expired/quality_fail/contamination/other) → Select options from destruction reasons
Reference doc input (optional) → Link to QA report or other audit trail document
Summary of LP/Product/Qty/Batch → Read-only display
Red banner emphasizing irreversibility → Alert variant='destructive' with audit notice
Confirm checkbox label → Must be explicitly acknowledged to enable button

label: use_by_override_manager_only
translation_notes: Manager-only access gate (isManager prop) → Backend: Server Action with RBAC check (requires role='Manager'|'Admin')
Non-manager path → Display-only message, no input fields enabled
Override reason enum (operational_requirement/awaiting_disposal/controlled_use_under_qa/regulatory_exemption/other) → Select from compliance-approved reasons
Conditional reasonText field → Form watch gate on reason='other', minLength 10
Compliance ack checkbox → Explicit acknowledgment of audit trail creation
Red banner with EU 1169/2011 reference → Alert variant='destructive' + regulatory context
Button disabled until reason && reasonText && ack → Three-stage validation gate

label: location_create_edit_form
translation_notes: Code input (alphanumeric + hyphen, max 20) → Input with pattern validation via Zod .regex()
Parent location dropdown → Query from locations table, filtered hierarchically
Depth validator (depthExceeded check) → Count parent path segments, compare to tenant limit (WH_SETTINGS.locations.maxDepth)
Type enum (storage/transit/receiving/production_line) → Select options from location type registry
Barcode field (optional, auto-generated if blank) → Generate UUID via nanoid() if not provided
Active checkbox → Boolean toggle (default true on create)
Error boundary for depth exceeded → FormControl with error message in FormDescription

label: cycle_count_quick_adjustment
translation_notes: Actual vs system qty comparison → Computed delta field (delta = actual - system)
Delta percentage calculation → Computed (Math.abs(delta) / lp.qty * 100), used for approval gate
>10% approval gate (needsApproval) → V-WH-MOV-004 rule trigger (routes to approval workflow)
Button color variant (btn-danger for approval, btn-primary for normal) → Conditional class based on needsApproval
Reason code enum (counting_error/damage/other) → Select options, limited for P1 stub
Reason text conditional (reason='other') → Form validation gate
Alert amber banner for >10% → Displays approval requirement message
Read-only LP/current-qty fields → Disabled inputs with gray background
known_bugs: BL-WH-01: Full cycle count workflow (M-14 is P1 stub — count plan, task assignment, reconciliation)

label: state_transition_confirm_modal
translation_notes: State machine transitions (available→blocked, blocked→available, etc.) → Enum graph from rules registry (lp_state_machine_v1)
Destructive transitions (to='blocked'/'consumed') → Button variant='destructive' styling
Dynamic reason options per from/to pair → Filtered from rule payload enum
Conditional reasonText field (reason='other') → Form watch + visibility gate
Alert banner for blocking action → Alert variant='warning' explaining operation consequence
LPStatus display component → Renders current and target status badges

label: force_unlock_scanner_modal
translation_notes: Admin-only force release action → Backend RBAC gate (requires role='Admin')
Scanner session invalidation → Call scanner session termination endpoint (06-Scanner API)
Locked-by user and duration display → Read-only summary of lock state
Amber warning banner → Alert variant='warning' about operation consequence
Summary rows → Read-only key-value pairs (LP/Locked-by/Duration/Last-location)
Audit notice → Informational text about action logging

label: warehouse_dashboard_kpi_strip
translation_notes: 8 KPI cards (2 rows × 4) → Grid layout with CSS grid or Tailwind grid-cols-4
Restricted visibility (role check for canSeeValue) → Conditional render via role='Manager'|'Admin'
Locked KPI display (🔒) → Conditional badge when restricted && not authorized
KPI accent colors (.kpi + k.accent class) → Computed className per KPI data
Click navigation (onNav callback) → Client-side routing to KPI detail screen
Data refresh metadata (last refreshed 14s ago, cached 60s) → Real-time cache TTL display

label: warehouse_dashboard_alerts_panel
translation_notes: Alert dismissal via dismiss() → Client-side Set state management (demo only; production: Server Action)
Alert severity color coding (alert-red/alert-amber/alert-blue/alert-green) → Conditional Alert variant
CTA button (e.g., 'Force unlock') → Opens corresponding modal via openModal callback
View link (→ navigation) → Client-side routing to alert detail/resolution page
Close button (✕) → Remove from visible alerts set
Alert code metadata → Mono-spaced code display for debugging

label: warehouse_dashboard_expiry_summary
translation_notes: Two color-coded cards (red ≤7d, amber ≤30d) → Clickable cards that navigate to expiry dashboard
Top 5 table → Query from WH_EXPIRY_TOP5 (select * from lp order by expiry limit 5)
ExpiryCell component render → Conditional color class per days remaining
Open expiry dashboard button → Navigation to WhExpiry page (WH-019)
Row click navigation → onOpenLp callback to LP detail page

label: warehouse_dashboard_activity_feed
translation_notes: Activity feed filtering (all/split/move/consume/output/receipt) → Select options driving filtered display
Timeline dots colored by event type → Conditional className (tl-dot + e.color)
LP link in activity text → Clickable span that calls onOpenLp
Event description & timestamp → Read-only text display
View all activity link → Navigation to full activity log page
Empty state message → Conditional render when no events match filter

label: lp_list_with_tabs_and_bulk_actions
translation_notes: Tab filtering (all/available/reserved/blocked/hold/intermediate) → Tab state + computed filter function
Search across LP#/product/batch fields → Case-insensitive string matching (production: full-text search via DB index)
More filters toggle (.showMore) → Conditional filter-bar render with additional selects
Bulk selection with checkbox → Set state for selected rows, toggle-all checkbox
Bulk actions bar (print/move/export/destroy) → Conditional render when selected.size > 0, calls openModal
Row-level actions (split/print/more) → Action buttons in last column calling openModal with row data
Pagination controls → Skip-take logic from computed visible array
Column sorting hint (click headers) → Placeholder (production: sort state + useCallback)
Inline status badges → ExpiryCell, LPStatus, QAStatus, ItemTypeBadge component renders

label: lp_detail_identity_card_sidebar
translation_notes: Identity card layout → Left sidebar (min-width: 300px) with sticky positioning
Field rows (.lp-id-field) → Heading + value pairs, some with secondary info
Source badge + links (GRN/WO refs) → Conditional render + clickable links for navigation
Reserved qty display with linked WO → Shows locked qty + link to Planning WO detail
Action buttons grid → Split, print, move, block, change QA, destroy → Calls openModal with LP data
Rules note at bottom → Read-only advisory text about state machine rules
Expiry banner on list → Rendered conditionally if expiryDays <= 7 && status='available'

label: lp_detail_tabs_overview_movements_genealogy
translation_notes: Tab navigation (overview/movements/genealogy/reservations/state/labels/audit) → Tab state management + conditional tab content render
Overview tab: Summary component for identity snapshot + custom fields table → Read-only display
Movements tab: Table of movement history (from/to locations, reason, user, timestamp) → Query from stock_movements table
Genealogy tab: Upstream/downstream nodes with operation icons + FEFO status → Recursive tree rendering from genealogy_edges CTE
Genealogy expand/collapse → Tree visualization with svg paths (not implemented in P1, tree nodes shown flat)
Export genealogy as FSMA 204 trace report → Server-side PDF generation via Puppeteer
Reservations tab: Table of active/consumed/cancelled reservations per WO → Query from lp_reservations table
State history tab: Timeline of status transitions with reasons → Query from audit log filtered by lp & field='status'
Labels tab: Print history with template/printer/copies/user/status → Query from label_jobs table
Audit tab: Full field-level audit log with old/new values → Query from audit_log table filtered by lp
known_bugs: BL-WH-06: ext_jsonb schema extensions editor on LP detail (currently read-only list)

label: grn_list_with_tabs
translation_notes: Tab filtering (all/draft/completed/cancelled) → Tab state + computed filter
Search across GRN#/PO#/supplier → Case-insensitive string matching
Advanced filters (source/warehouse/date-range/supplier) → Conditional filter-bar render
CSV export button → Server-side report generation
Create GRN buttons (from PO/from TO) → openModal callbacks
GRN status badge → GRNStatus component with color coding per status
Table columns: GRN/source/source-doc/supplier/receipt-date/warehouse/status/lines/qty/received-by → All read-only display

label: grn_detail_readonly_snapshot
translation_notes: GRN status badge → GRNStatus component display
Summary bar (.wo-summary-bar) → 5 items (source/supplier/receipt-date/default-location/received-by) in horizontal layout
Notes section (optional) → Conditional render if g.notes present, styled card
LPs created table → Rows from g.items, each clickable to LP detail
Column set: line/product/LP/qty/batch/supplier-batch/expiry/location/QA/catch-weight → All read-only
Status history timeline → Activity feed of GRN transitions (created → completed/cancelled)
View all LPs link → Navigation to LP list filtered by grn-ref
Export button → Server-side data export (CSV/PDF)

label: movement_list_with_side_panel
translation_notes: Tab filtering (all/receipts/consume-to-WO/transfers/adjustments/approvals) → Tab state + computed filter
Search across SM#/LP#/product/WO# → Case-insensitive matching
Advanced filters (move-type/date-range/location/LP#/WO#/user) → Conditional filter-bar render
Manager approvals alert (>10% adjustments) → Conditional amber alert box if tab='approvals' && pending count > 0
Side panel detail (selectedMv state) → Slide-in panel showing Summary + metadata + action links
CSV export button → Server-side report generation
Side panel navigation links (Open LP, Open WO, Open GRN) → Conditional render based on movement.ref type

label: reservations_list_with_summary_strip
translation_notes: Tab filtering (active/consumed/cancelled/all) → Tab state + computed filter
Summary strip (4 KPI tiles) → Computed counts from filtered reservations (active-locks/total-kg/active-wos/pending-release)
Table columns: WO/material-line/LP/reserved-qty/LP-total/expiry/location/reserved-at/by/status/release-reason/action → All read-only except action button
Release button → Conditional render when r.status='active', calls openModal('releaseReservation')
Status badges (active/consumed/cancelled) → Conditional badge variant per status
Create reservation button → openModal('reserve')
Info banner → Explains hard-locks and intermediate LP consumption model

label: inventory_browser_by_product
translation_notes: View toggle (by-product/by-location/by-batch) → Pill buttons switching computed view state
Expandable product rows → Click to expand shows child LPs table for that product
Restricted value display (canSeeValue check) → Shows 🔒 when role != 'Manager'|'Admin'
Column set: product/type/total/reserved/available/QC-hold/LPs/earliest-expiry/locations/strategy/value → All read-only
Sub-table on expand → Child LPs with LP/qty/batch/expiry/location/status/QA columns
View all LPs link in sub-table → Navigation to LP list filtered by product
Filter bar (warehouse/item-type/QA-status/location/status) → Multiple select filters
known_bugs: BL-WH-05: Inventory 'By Location' full ltree @> hierarchical browser (currently flat L2 table)

label: locations_hierarchy_browser
translation_notes: Location tree sidebar (.loc-tree) → Nested tree structure, click to select, expand/collapse toggle
Tree node rendering per level → Conditional indentation + toggle visibility for l.level < 2
Type icons (storage/transit/receiving/production_line) → Conditional icon span per l.type
Selected node detail panel → Summary bar with LP count, parent, depth, utilization
Admin-only edit buttons (Edit/+ Child/Deactivate) → Conditional render when isAdmin=true
Bin occupancy grid (when selected.level=1) → CSS grid of bin-cells with color coding per utilization
LPs at location table → Child LPs of selected location, paginated (first 25), clickable to LP detail
Location create/edit modal → openModal('locationEdit')

label: genealogy_tracer_backward_forward
translation_notes: Trace seed input (LP#/batch#/supplier-batch) → Autocomplete input, scan button (06-Scanner)
Mode toggle (forward/backward/full-trace) → Pill buttons switching trace direction
Depth slider (1–10) → Range input for genealogy query max-depth parameter
Empty state → Centered placeholder until queried=true
Summary bar (.wo-summary-bar) → Displays seed LP + product + batch + trace mode + node count + query time
Success alert → Shows node count + depth levels + FEFO compliance summary
Genealogy canvas (.gen-canvas) → Nodes rendered as divs with operation icons (◯ receipt, ← consume, → output)
Node styling per depth → CSS class l{depth} for left indentation
FEFO badge per node → Conditional render showing FEFO-compliant vs Override
Export buttons (FSMA 204 PDF / CSV) → Server-side report generation
known_bugs: BL-WH-05: Inventory 'By Location' full ltree @> hierarchical browser

label: expiry_dashboard_management
translation_notes: KPI strip (2 color-coded cards) → Red (use_by expired & blocked) + Amber (best_before expired)
Tab filtering (expired/expiring-soon) → Tab state + conditional content render
Shelf-mode filter pills (all/use_by/best_before) → Pill buttons filtering visible rows when tab='expired'
Days bucket pills (≤7d/≤30d/custom-range) → Pill buttons when tab='expiring' (P1 stub)
Rows show conditional columns (auto-blocked timestamp only when tab='expired') → Ternary render in thead/tbody
Action buttons per row → destroy (both modes) + manager-override (use_by only) + block (best_before) + view-LP (expiring)
Admin-only cron button → 'Run cron now' button when isAdmin=true
Shelf-mode explanation cards → Two styled cards explaining use_by vs best_before semantics

label: warehouse_settings_admin_form
translation_notes: Category sidebar (loc-tree styled) → 9 tabs (general/numbering/GRN/picking/expiry/labels/scanner/locations/integrations)
Admin-only edit mode → Conditional readOnly=true on inputs when !isAdmin
Unsaved changes banner → Conditional render when dirty=true, with Save/Discard buttons
Form field groups per category → Conditional render based on cat state
Info banner boxes (blue) → Alert variant='default' with contextual help text
Read-only link to rule registry → 'View in Settings → Rule Registry' with optional click handler
Cron schedule display (next 3 runs) → Read-only text showing next scheduled runs
Disabled settings with lock icon → Checkbox disabled=true with lock emoji in label
Printer dropdown → Dynamic render of WH_PRINTERS with online status indicator
known_bugs: BL-WH-02: Warehouse Settings → Locations tab + Integrations tab (currently ScaffoldedScreen placeholders)
